title: QoL Crafting
description: Adds many QoL recipes including woodcutting, full blocks from slabs, smelting raw ore blocks, and more
body:
**QoL Crafting** adds new crafting recipes and changes some existing ones to improve quality of life and make many recipes more consistent. It maintains the Vanilla feel and balance, and it has built-in advancements so that the recipes seemlessly appear in your recipe book.

### Additions
- Slabs and carpets can be crafting back into full blocks
- Stonecutters can cut wood items
- Stonecutters can cut Sandstone and Red Sandstone into 2 Sand and 2 Red Sand respectively
- All wool, carpets, stained glass, stained glass panes, terracotta, concrete, concrete powder, banners, and candles can be dyed and redyed.
- Four chests can be crafted at once using logs
- Raw ore blocks can be smelted at 1/9 speed
- Dispensers can be crafted in bulk with droppers, string, and sticks
- Chest Boats can be crafted in bulk with planks and a chest
- Chest, furnace, hopper, and tnt minecarts can be crafted in bulk in a similar manner
- Leather armor and potions can be recyled in a crafting window
- Rooted Dirt can be crafted from Dirt and Hanging Roots
- Charcoal can be crafted into Black Dye
- Glow Ink Sacs can be crafted into Cyan Dye
- Green dye can be crafted from 1 blue and 1 yellow dye
- Cyan dye can be crafted from 2 blue and 1 yellow dye
- Lime dye can be crafted from 1 blue and 2 yellow dye
  
### Tweaks
- More stone types can be used in crafting recipes
- Smelting iron and gold armor yeilds ingots instead of nuggets
- Lime dye is crafted from green and yellow dye rather than green and white
- Looms require 4 planks instead of 2 like other workstation blocks
- 8 wool can be dyed at a time like other dyeable blocks
- Nether Bricks can be smelted from Crimson Nylium and Warped Nylium
- The Rail recipe yeilds 20 instead of 16
- The Powered Rail recipe yeilds 8 instead of 6
- The Ladder recipe yields 6 instead of 3
- The Banner recipes yield 3 rather than 1
- The Candle recipe now yields 2 instead of 1
- The Repeated recipe now yields 2 instead of 1
- The Comparator recipe now yields 2 instead of 1
- The Sandstone recipe now yields 2 instead of 1
- The Red Sandstone recipe now yields 2 instead of 1
